text.title: Agent Context-Engineering Corpus Standard Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Agent Context-Engineering Corpus Standard output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

required.field: closed-vocabulary terms referenced in the entry

forbidden.pattern: introduces a new term not in glossary (without glossary PR)
vendor-only framing with no pattern-level claim

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: glossary_terms_used populated with a typed value
sources populated with a typed value
artefact_shape_compliance populated with a typed value
vendor_mappings populated with a typed value
last_reviewed populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
